title: Golf Coach
description:
Job Description & Requirements

GOLFTEC is a global leader in golf instruction, combining proprietary technology with proven teaching methodologies to help golfers improve. With state-of-the-art facilities at Republic Plaza and GR.iD Mall, we are committed to delivering premium golf coaching experiences to players of all skill levels.

As a GOLFTEC Coach, you will leverage your expertise and our proprietary teaching technology to provide personalized, high-quality golf instruction. You will also contribute to daily operations, equipment merchandising, and fostering strong client relationships.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct one-on-one golf lessons using GOLFTEC’s advanced technology and teaching methods.
  • Recommend personalized instruction plans to help students achieve their goals.
  • Provide outdoor/on-course coaching when required.
  • Assist in center operations, including merchandising and selling golf equipment.
  • Perform custom club fittings using advanced fitting tools.
  • Build strong relationships with students and promote GOLFTEC programs.
  • Represent GOLFTEC at internal and external events.

Qualifications & Requirements

  • Qualified member of a recognized PGA preferred.
  • Minimum 5 years of golf coaching experience.
  • Strong knowledge of golf swing mechanics and instruction methods.
  • Familiarity with golf instruction and club fitting technologies is a plus.
  • Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills.
  • Customer-oriented with a passion for helping players improve.

Skills

  • Golf Coaching & Instruction
  • Custom Club Fitting
  • Leadership & Mentoring
  • Communication & Customer Service
  • Sales & Merchandising
  • Golf Technology (Foresight, GOLFTEC systems)
  • Teamwork & Collaboration

Compensation & Benefits

  • Competitive base salary: $7,000 – $12,000 per month
  • Performance-based commissions and bonuses
  • Comprehensive training via GOLFTEC University
  • Dental & Health insurance
  • Employee discounts on golf equipment
  • Flexible scheduling (including weekends & shifts)

If you are passionate about golf and eager to make a difference in golfers’ lives, we want to hear from you! Please submit your CV detailing your experience.

GOLFTEC Singapore is committed to staying at the forefront of technology-based golf instruction. All coaches will undergo professional training with the GOLFTEC University Program and have opportunities for growth and career progression.

postedCompany.description:
GOLFTEC is the global leader in golf instruction with millions of lessons taught and more than 200 centres across the USA, Canada, Japan, China, Hong Kong, and Singapore. Since 1995, we have been focused on one central mission—to help people play better golf. With an unwavering commitment to that goal, we provide a place where golfers of all ages and ability levels can work with an expert in golf instruction to build a game improvement plan customized to their specific needs and goals.

GOLFTEC Singapore is an exclusive licensed franchisee of the proven GOLFTEC model, combining excellent golf teaching professionals and proprietary technology to provide world class golf instruction and custom club fitting services in our 6-bay flagship centre in Raffles Place.
postedCompany.name: PGSG PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
